variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Explosions/Remote violence'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

variables.description: The absolute change in the 1-month CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) over the same 7-day period

variables.name: fomc_rate_decision_week
variables.description: Whether a Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) interest rate decision or scheduled policy announcement occurs during the week of June 21-28, 2026

variables.name: vxv_vix_ratio
variables.description: The ratio of the 3-month volatility index (VXV) to the 1-month volatility index (VIX) at the start of the period

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will an AI-enabled cyber-attack, attributed to a state actor, cause significant disruption to critical national infrastructure in any G20 country before 1 July 2026?

variables.name: geopolitical_conflict_intensity
variables.description: The number of active major interstate conflicts involving G20 nations (e.g., Russia-Ukraine, potential China-Taiwan escalations) as of June 2026

variables.name: ai_agent_autonomy_breakthrough
variables.description: Whether a major AI lab or cybersecurity firm reports a significant breakthrough in autonomous AI agents capable of end-to-end cyber attack execution without human intervention

variables.name: reported_state_ai_incidents
variables.description: The total number of publicly reported state-sponsored cyber incidents that utilized AI for reconnaissance or exploitation in the 12 months preceding July 2026

variables.name: critical_infrastructure_vulnerability_index
variables.description: A representative count of newly discovered 'zero-day' vulnerabilities in common industrial control systems (ICS) or supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA) software in the first half of 2026

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will HSIC's market close price on 2026-06-28 be higher than its market close price on 2026-06-21?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sector_etf_performance
variables.description: Weekly percentage change of the iShares U.S. Healthcare Providers ETF (IHF) between 2026-06-21 and 2026-06-28

variables.name: hsic_historical_volatility
variables.description: The annualized 30-day historical volatility of HSIC as of 2026-06-21

variables.name: market_wide_trend
variables.description: Whether the S&P 500 Index (SPY) closes higher on 2026-06-28 compared to its close on 2026-06-21

variables.name: insider_buying_activity
variables.description: Whether any Form 4 filings for HSIC insider purchases were reported in the 30 days leading up to 2026-06-21

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will China, Russia, the U.S., or the EU publicly announce new economic or trade sanctions that specifically target a state-owned oil or gas entity in Egypt, Jordan, or the United Arab Emirates (UAE) by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: uae_brics_cooperation_level
variables.description: The degree to which the UAE's involvement in BRICS+ or cooperation with Russia/China triggers Western secondary sanction warnings.

variables.name: russia_sanctions_circumvention_cases
variables.description: Number of documented instances where Egypt, Jordan, or UAE entities are accused by the US/EU of facilitating Russian energy sanction evasion.

variables.name: us_middle_east_diplomatic_tension
variables.description: A binary indicator of a major public diplomatic rift between the US and the UAE or Egypt over energy policy or regional alignments.

variables.name: ofac_designations_mena_energy
variables.description: The total number of new OFAC designations specifically targeting any corporate entities in the Middle East energy sector (excluding Iran).

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BDX's market close price on 2026-06-28 be higher than its market close price on 2026-06-21?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between June 21, 2026, and June 28, 2026, representing general market sentiment.

variables.name: ihi_etf_weekly_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the iShares U.S. Medical Devices ETF (IHI) over the same period, indicating sector-specific trends.

variables.name: bdx_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) for BDX as of June 21, 2026, to identify if the stock is overbought or oversold.

variables.name: major_fda_announcement_week
variables.description: Whether BDX receives or announces a major FDA approval or product recall during the week of June 21 to June 28, 2026.
